item.text: I’m updating the lead summary contract to the new `LeadFollowUpDigest` shape and will trace the typed dependency chain in `Main.clasp` and `Shared/Lead.clasp` before editing.

I’ve isolated the change set: replace `LeadSummary` with `LeadFollowUpDigest`, reshape the playbook lookup request, update workflow state and API types, and adjust `main` to return the new owner field. I’m applying the minimal edits in those two files now.
The first patch missed an exact context match in `Main.clasp`. I’m re-reading the live file and applying a narrower patch so the edit stays local.
The contract changes are in place. I’m running the workspace verifier now to catch any type or runtime issues before stopping.

item.text:
Updated the lead follow-up contract to `LeadFollowUpDigest` in [Shared/Lead.clasp](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-follow-up-window-upgrade-oracle-compiler-owned-air-RMX09z/Shared/Lead.clasp) and propagated it through [Main.clasp](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-follow-up-window-upgrade-oracle-compiler-owned-air-RMX09z/Main.clasp): the API now returns `LeadFollowUpDigest`, workflow state stores `digest`, and the playbook lookup request now carries `followUpWindowDays` and `escalationOwner`.

`main` now evaluates to `"sales-manager"` as required. Verification passed with `bash scripts/verify.sh`.
